name: Stuffed Barbecue Pork Loin
recipeInstructions:
-------------
FOR THE PORK:
1. MAKE THE STUFFING: Combine all stuffing ingredients in a 4 quart microwave-safe bowl. Stir well to blend.
2. Cook, uncovered, on high for 20 minutes or until thickened (note: stuffing will turn into a black, tar-like mass – this is okay!). Cool to room temperature.
3. Drain stuffing in a metal colander over a deep bowl to catch drippings. While draining, proceed with the rest of the dish.
4. TO MAKE ROAST: Mix finely chopped garlic, ground cumin, cayenne pepper, ketchup, soy sauce, and Worcestershire sauce. Add drainings from stuffing; mix well.
5. Stuff the stuffing into the pocket of the pork using a spoon. Close the open end of the pocket with toothpicks or poultry skewers.
6. Place the pork in a foil-lined roasting dish. Pour 1 cup of the sauce over the pork, covering it completely.
7. Roast in a preheated 350°F oven for about 45 minutes, basting twice and using half of the remaining sauce each time.
8. Remove roast from pan. Cover with aluminum foil and let it stand for about 15 minutes before slicing.
9. Heat pan drippings and sauce and serve alongside the pork.
